title: Ice Formation - Cursed Fate Addon
description: Adds Uraume’s Ice Formation to the Cursed Fate Mod, featuring 6 freezing abilities including Ice Shard, Frost Calm, Icy Grasp, Ice Slide, Maximum Output, and Ice Age.
body:
**Uraume – The Frozen Star
Innate Technique: Ice Formation**

**Ability 1 – Ice Shard**
Launch a razor-sharp shard of ice that slows enemies on impact. Charge the attack to fire up to 8 shards at once, or use the Chant Variant to greatly increase its power.

**Ability 2 – Frost Calm**
Call down nine massive ice pillars at a targeted area, freezing and damaging everything caught within. Activate Maximum Output to dramatically increase the size and devastation of the attack.

**Ability 3 – Icy Grasp**
Seize an enemy in front of you with freezing force, locking them in place as frost consumes them, before violently launching them away.

**Ability 4 – Ice Slide**
Glide across the battlefield at high speed by forming ice beneath your feet. The Flow Variant freezes everything in your path, slowing enemies you pass.

**Ability 5 – Maximum Output**
Channel greater cursed energy into your technique, empowering certain abilities with increased damage and scale.

**Ability 6 – Ice Age**
Charge your power and unleash a cataclysmic wave of freezing energy, encasing nearby mobs in solid ice while dealing massive freezing damage.
